description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow consists of two jobs: ruff and test. The ruff job lints the code using ruff on an ubuntu-latest environment. The test job runs tests on multiple versions of Python, Django, and Elasticsearch, requiring the ruff job to succeed. It sets up a test environment with Solr and Elasticsearch services, installs dependencies, and runs tests using tox.
